display.purpose: Landing hero headlines and major section titles.

body.purpose: Step descriptions, panel copy, settings labels.

motion.name: spring-control
motion.purpose: Button hover/tap scale feedback via Framer Motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action on landing and app chrome.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 16px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-primary, #2b7fff); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-hover, #2563eb); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #2b7fff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions with surface fill and border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 16px 32px; border: 2px solid var(--color-border-hover, #e5e7eb); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-text-primary, #364153); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-surface-elevated, #f2f4f7); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #2b7fff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: CTA Button
components.description: Landing hero call-to-action with premium layering.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 0; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; } .ds-btn-cta::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--color-primary, #2b7fff); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-btn-cta-label { position: relative; padding: 12px 28px; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-btn-cta:hover::before { background: var(--color-primary-hover, #2563eb); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #2b7fff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Marketing feature block or settings section container.
components.html:
Step-by-step playback

Watch each comparison and swap with synchronized descriptions.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #f3f4f6); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-text-primary, #364153); } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #6b7280); }

components.name: Glass Control Chip
components.css: .ds-chip-glass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-glass-border, rgba(255,255,255,0.2)); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-glass-bg, rgba(255,255,255,0.7)); color: var(--color-interactive-text, #374151); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-chip-glass:hover { background: var(--color-interactive-bg-hover, rgba(255,255,255,0.6)); } .ds-chip-glass:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #2b7fff); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Bayan Flow looks like a focused lab instrument: generous whitespace, tinted neutrals, and a single confident blue primary. The visualization canvas owns attention; panels and controls recede until needed.
keyCharacteristics: Inter Variable for all UI copy

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Visualization state colors are algorithm vocabulary — never reuse for marketing chrome.

rules.name: The Inter Lock Rule
rules.body: Inter is the established brand face. Do not swap fonts without an explicit rebrand request.

rules.name: The Flat Canvas Rule
rules.body: The visualizer canvas stays flat. Elevation belongs to chrome, not data cells.

dos: Do use CSS variables from src/index.css for every new surface and text color.
Do verify Arabic RTL after horizontal layout changes.
Do preserve 44px minimum touch targets on controls.
donts: Don't use generic AI SaaS landing tropes.
Don't nest cards inside cards in the visualizer shell.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing on UI transitions.
Don't swap Inter or replace Phosphor with emoji icons without a rebrand request.
